mechanics.excerpt: You may add 306 damage and the attack has an Armor Penetration Value of Flying Klck (Attack): Costs Fatigue You can melee attack target up to two meters away: you win the round; the target must make Knockdown Test: In addition_ if the target was not in melee combat with you at the beginning of the round_ he may not inflict damage on you even if he wins this round of combat, Navigation / Naval This is the skill of plotting ad following course through the waters Of planet; whether traveling in surface vessel Or submarine_ NEGOTIATION character with the Negotiation Skill is trained in the fine art of conversation and manipulation_ Negotiation Skill Check will affect the outcome of any negotiation which the charac ter takes part, successful roll will bring concessions but tailed roll could mean stalemate Or worse.
